title: #3 - Adding my payment methods.
bodyHtml:
How do I set up my payment methods?

First, fill out your personal information to confirm the identity of one of the company’s representatives. Add your name, date of birth, country of residence, phone number, and home address. Then select “confirm”.

 

 

Next step is to provide “proof of business registration”. Add your legal business name and DBA/trade name. A DBA (Doing Business As) or trade name is a name that a business uses for trading goods or services, which is different from its legal, registered name.

 

 

 

 

Next, enter your business registration number. This is a unique identifier assigned to your company by the government agency responsible for business registration in your country. It's used for legal, tax, and administrative purposes. The format and name of this number vary by country, so refer to the country where your company is registered.

 

Then, enter your business phone number and business address.

 

After that, you'll need to provide information about the company director(s) and beneficial owner(s). Enter your name, date of birth, country of residence, phone number, and home address, then select "Confirm." Under the beneficial owner(s) section, fill in the relevant details for each beneficial owner.

 

The last step is to submit the authorization letter of the company. Make sure it’s an official document.

 

Don’t forget to select “submit”: you’ll  need to click submit both after each stage and at the final stage “Submit.

 

 

You’ll be directed to another tab where you’ll need to add your business bank account.

 

N.B: Please, add always your business bank account (the IBAN stated in the official Bank document in the “legal details” section needs to be the same you will upload in HyperWallet) and not your personal one. 

 

Note that once we send your account to be confirmed by our legal team, it’s required that you have at least a bank account that matches the bank info document (BIC and IBAN) you submitted before in your Back Office.

 

Additionally, you can also set up your PayPal account ,which means you'll have 2 payment methods — the PayPal account and the bank account that corresponds with your legal documentation.

 

 

To learn more about how to set up your Back Office account, go to the next article.

 

REMINDER: 

Your listings and your account will appear as “Offline” until your account will be validated by the Activation team.

 

Once you have completed all the sections of the onboarding, please send an email to activation-eu@backmarket.com

 

Need help? Don't hesitate to reach out to the Back Market team at activation-eu@backmarket.com
